column2: The crochet wide band bikini bottoms
column3:
The bikini top of the season. Our crochet wide band bikini bottom features double-layered fabric and a stylish wide band cut designed to sit perfectly on your hips for the ultimate flattering fit. It’s a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With its delicate crochet detailing and flattering silhouette, this bikini is made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. It’s the staple piece you’ll be reaching for again and again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Stretchy fabric, slip on style
  • Wide band straps for that ultra flattering fit
  • Pair with our matching wide band bikini top



Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

column3:
Introducing Ibiza Nights: a carefully curated collection of premium fabrics and ultra-flattering shapes, all perfect for those occasions that need that little bit of extra glam. The perfect blend of elegance and sparkle, with show-stopping pieces you can mix and match that you’ll be reaching for over and over again.

Among these stunning pieces is the sequin cowl top - designed to bring that signature Ibiza sparkle to your wardrobe. With its shimmering fabric and flowing silhouette, it’s the ideal statement piece to elevate any outfit, whether you’re dancing the night away or enjoying a sunset soirée.

  • Adjustable straps
  • Open back 
  • Double layered 
  • Cowl neck design 
  • Wear on its own or part of a set 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size XS
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

Please note due to the delicate nature of the fabric sequins may shed - this is not a fault of the product.

Introducing Casa del Sol, a sun-kissed collection of effortless staples designed to live in your wardrobe long after golden hour fades. Inspired by slow mornings, balmy nights, and Mediterranean escapes, each piece is made to be worn, reworn, and cherished. Think timeless silhouettes with a romantic edge, curated in limited runs to keep you feeling one of a kind wherever the sun takes you.

Among these effortless pieces is our sequin cowl top - designed to shimmer softly with every step and capture the glow of golden hour. Its flowing silhouette adds a radiant twist to timeless elegance, perfect for days that drift into balmy nights.

Made from premium, lightweight fabric with a flattering drape and adjustable tie, this versatile sarong is perfect for a variety of styling options. Its vibrant florals and soft coastal hues bring to life the relaxed feel of endless summer. The luxurious feel and easy-to-wear design make it an essential piece for your getaway wardrobe. Turn heads and soak up the sun with effortless summer vibes.

  • Tie up sarong measures – 130cm x 180cm
  • Perfect to pair with our matching bikini set
